reasons: Khufra's airborne control creates a clean entry point for Guinevere's burst.
Khufra's anti-blink pressure makes it harder for enemies to escape Guinevere's combo.

proof.summary: Khufra starts the control chain, and Guinevere follows with airborne-based magic burst.
worksBestWhen: Khufra confirms control before Guinevere commits.
Guinevere saves Violet Requiem for a controlled or airborne target.
failureCases: Guinevere jumps before Khufra lands control.
Enemy uses immunity or displacement after the first control effect.

reasons: Gatotkaca can knock enemies airborne with a large engage, giving Guinevere a strong follow-up window.
Guinevere can add burst after Gatotkaca forces enemies into a controlled area.

proof.summary: Gatotkaca starts with airborne engage, while Guinevere follows with her own airborne burst combo.
worksBestWhen: Gatotkaca lands Avatar of Guardian on priority targets.
Guinevere waits until enemies are controlled before committing.
failureCases: Guinevere enters after enemies already recover or spread out.

reasons: Ruby can pull and stun enemies, setting up Guinevere's jump and ultimate.
Ruby's repeated control helps keep enemies inside Guinevere's burst window.

proof.summary: Ruby controls target positioning, while Guinevere follows with magic burst before the target can escape.
worksBestWhen: Ruby pulls enemies into Guinevere's entry range.
Guinevere waits for Ruby's control before using her main commit.
failureCases: Ruby pulls enemies away from Guinevere's jump angle.
Enemy defensive skills survive the combined control window.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a single target, giving Guinevere a fixed target for burst.
Guinevere benefits from Kaja removing the target's ability to dodge during the setup window.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates the target, while Guinevere follows with magic burst on the controlled enemy.
worksBestWhen: Kaja suppresses a priority target instead of a tank.
Guinevere positions close enough to follow the drag.
failureCases: Guinevere commits before Kaja confirms suppression.

reasons: Tigreal can group and stun enemies, giving Guinevere a better chance to land a multi-target burst combo.
Guinevere can follow Tigreal's engage after enemies are already pulled into one area.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates a grouped control window, and Guinevere follows with jump-based magic burst.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Guinevere is in follow-up range.
Guinevere waits for grouped control before committing.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far away from Guinevere.
Enemy spreads out or uses defensive tools after the pull.
